main.description:
## First release 🎉

This is the **first build** of the Bayonetta Archipelago Randomizer — expect
bugs. It's playable, but rough edges are likely, especially in less-tested areas.

If you hit something broken or unexpected, please
[open an Issue](../../issues) with as much detail as you can (what you were doing,
what happened, and anything from the in-game console). Suggestions are welcome too.

### Downloads

- **`dinput8.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`).
- **`bayonetta.apworld`** — place in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder.
- **`Bayonetta.yaml`** — place in your Archipelago `Players` folder
- **`z.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder along side the dinput8.dll (next to `Bayonetta.exe`).

See the [README](../../blob/main/README.md) for full setup and troubleshooting.
main.title: 1.0 - First Build!

v1.1.description:
## v1.1

Bug fixes and a tracker upgrade based on player feedback from the first release.

### Fixed
- **Chapter V Competion Check now requires Beast Within in logic.** Previously the generator
  could consider Chapter V's completion reachable before you had the panther
  transformation needed for its platforming finale. It's now properly gated.
- **Chapter unlocks persist correctly on reconnect** — unlocked chapters no
  longer carry over incorrectly between sessions.

### Added
- **Tracker now shows what you can actually do.** A clear "You have N checks you
  can do right now" line, so you always know what's actionable.
- **Chapters-in-logic indicator** — see how many chapters are currently open;
  hover for the full list.
- **Locked chapters are hidden** from the tracker's location list until unlocked,
  while overall progress still counts every check in the game.
- The tracker updates live as you receive chapter unlocks and key techniques.

### Downloads
- **`dinput8.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`).
- **`bayonetta.apworld`** — place in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder.

**Existing seeds keep their original logic** — the Chapter V fix applies to newly
generated seeds only. Grab the updated `.apworld` and regenerate to get it.

Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — feedback from the
first release drove all of these changes.
v1.1.title: v1.1 - Chapter V logic fix + tracker upgrade

v1.2.description:
## v1.2

Major client-side overhaul and apworld fixes based on player feedback from v1.1.

### Added
- **On-Screen Notification System** — Color-coded popups appear in the top-left
  corner for every event: received items (green), location checks (blue),
  DeathLink events (red), hints (yellow), chapter/verse/Alfheim completions
  (gold/orange). Notifications auto-fade and require no key press — always
  visible without interfering with gameplay.
- **Shop Auto-Scouting (Gates of Hell)** — Entering Rodin's shop automatically
  scouts all available shop items without consuming hint points. Displays the
  exact AP item at each shop location with classification: `(Progression)`,
  `(Useful)`, `(Filler)`, or `(Trap)`.
- **Expanded Filler Item Pool** — Added 7 new halo denominations (1,000 through
  200,000) for more varied filler rewards. Increased consumable and crafting
  ingredient counts per seed.
- **Local Send Logging** — All location checks and item sends now log in the
  same format as the Archipelago website.

### Fixed
- **DeathLink no longer triggers false verse completions.** Receiving a
  DeathLink was incorrectly marking the current verse as complete. DeathLink
  kills are now properly isolated from verse and chapter completion detection.
- **Chapter blocking hook no longer breaks scrolling.** The hook was writing to
  memory every frame, breaking mouse wheel scrolling in Load Game, Gates of
  Hell shop, and Chapter Select menus. Now only writes when the chapter limit
  actually changes.
- **Alfheim locations now exist in seeds.** The 21 Alfheim locations were
  missing from region creation, causing every seed to fail item/location count
  checks and discard filler items. All Alfheims now properly receive items.
- **Victory condition now targets Requiem.** The goal was set to Chapter XVI's
  completion, which only required one unlock item. Now correctly points to
  Requiem's completion, requiring all 16 chapter unlocks plus Requiem Unlock.
- **Duplicate location ID 610001 removed.** "Goal: Complete Requiem" and
  "Prologue - Verse 1" shared the same ID, causing ambiguous client checks.
- **YAML options now actually work.** Include/exclude toggles for weapons,
  techniques, accessories, consumables, crafting, halos, and golden LPs were
  ignored during generation. Pool filtering is now properly wired.
- **Starting Chapter now precollects all earlier unlocks.** The docstring
  promised "along with all earlier chapters" but only the chosen chapter's
  unlock was precollected. Fixed to match documented behavior.
- **Victory item no longer shuffled into the pool.** The "Victory" item (51999)
  was a progression item that could be found in checks, doing nothing. Now
  properly handled as an event.
- **Honor-system text removed from chapter unlocks** — the blocking hook
  enforces them directly.
- **Hook install log spam removed** — `[chblock]` messages no longer clutter
  the console.

Special Thanks to dowlle for the [issue report💋](https://github.com/Boi-027/BayonettaArchipelago/issues/3)

### Improved
- **Notification Safety** — Notification windows use `NoNav`,
  `NoScrollWithMouse`, `NoScrollbar`, and `NoInputs` flags to prevent any
  interference with game input or menus.
- **`apworld` version bumped to 1.2.0** in `archipelago.json`.

### Downloads
- **`dinput8.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to
  `Bayonetta.exe`).
- **`bayonetta.apworld`** — place in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder.
- **`z.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to
  `Bayonetta.exe`).
- **Update both files** — the client and apworld work together for the new
  filler items and shop scouting.

**Existing seeds keep their original logic** — apworld fixes apply to newly
generated seeds only. Grab the updated `.apworld` and regenerate to get them.

Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — feedback from the
first release drove all of these changes.
v1.2.title: v1.2 - Major client-side overhaul and apworld fixes based on player feedback from v1.1.

v1.3.description:
## v1.3

Major content expansion: all 44 treasure chests are now locations, plus goal options, expanded heart/pearl pools.

### Added
- **44 Treasure Chest Locations** — Every Umbra Witches' final resting place is now an AP location (IDs 60301‑60345). Opening a chest automatically sends the check; the client detects them by polling the lane‑flag memory addresses mapped during development.
- **Goal Options** — Three goal modes available in YAML:
  - `all_chapters` — Complete all 17 chapters including Requiem
  - `chapter_count` — Complete a set number of chapters (Requiem can be one)
  - `boss_rush` — Only the 6 boss chapters + Requiem
  
           - "Chapter IV: The Cardinal Virtue of Fortitude",
           - "Chapter VII: The Cardinal Virtue of Temperance",
           - "Chapter XI: The Cardinal Virtue of Justice",
           - "Chapter XIII: The Cardinal Virtue of Prudence",
           - "Chapter XIV: Isla Del Sol",
           - "Chapter XVI: The Lumen Sage",
           
  - `chapter_count_no_requiem` — Complete X chapters, Requiem not required
- **`goal_chapter_count` YAML option** — Sets the target number for count‑based goals (range 1‑17, default 8).
- **`include_chests` YAML option** — Toggle treasure chest locations on or off (default on).
- **Expanded Heart / Pearl Pool** — Every seed now includes 40 Broken Witch Hearts and 16 Broken Moon Pearls by default, ensuring full HP and MP progression is always possible.

### Improved
- **Shutdown Sequence** — Should close the game properly now and not leave it running in the background after closing it.
- **Goal logic** — Completion conditions now correctly count collected (checked) locations, so count‑based goals trigger as soon as the target is met.

### Downloads
- **`dinput8.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`).
- **`bayonetta.apworld`** — place in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder.
- **`z.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`).
- **Update both files** — the client and apworld work together for the new chest locations and goal options.

**Existing seeds keep their original logic** — goal and chest changes apply to newly generated seeds only. Grab the updated `.apworld` and regenerate to get them.

Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — feedback drives every update.
v1.3.title: v1.3 - Major content expansion: all 44 treasure chests are now locations, plus goal options, expanded heart/pearl pools.

v1.4.description:
## v1.4

The big one since v1.3 — a full generator rewrite that fixes every goal, safer chest/technique handling, three cross-game link protocols, ten traps, a MacGuffin hunt, and a smarter in-game tracker.

### What's New

**New goal: MacGuffin Hunt** — A configurable number of **Eyes of the World Fragments** are scattered across the multiworld, and you win the moment you've collected enough — no Requiem required, no final boss, just the hunt. **`macguffins_required`** (default 10, range 1–100) sets how many you need, and **`macguffins_total`** (default 15, range 1–100) sets how many exist. Both accept standard AP weighted YAML values (`macguffins_total: {30: 50, random-range-1-100: 20}`). If you ask for more Eyes than the pool can fit, the generator caps them to what fits instead of failing — Ship of Harkinian Triforce Hunt style.

**Ten new trap items** — Junk checks can now bite back. The full pool:
- **Pickpocket** — Steals up to 10,000 Halos.
- **Bloodletting** — Halves your current HP (never kills).
- **Fragile Witch** — Sets you to 1 HP. Don't get hit.
- **Magic Drain** — Empties your magic gauge.
- **Amnesia** — Forgets a random technique you own for 30 seconds, then gives it back.
- **Sticky Fingers** — Swipes up to 3 of one random consumable.
- **Squish** — Bayonetta gets flattened for 20 seconds. (Makes you slippery and heavy)
- **Angel Ambush** — Three random rank-and-file angels spawn on you.
- **Grace & Glory** — The claw duo joins your fight.
- **???** — Play a session to find out... 💋

Ambush enemies queue up if you're in a menu and pounce the moment you're back in gameplay. A new **`trap_percentage`** YAML option (default 15) controls how much of the junk pool becomes traps — set it to 0 for a trap-free seed.

**Three new link protocols, all off by default**
- **Damage Link** — Damage you take is shared with every other Damage Link player, and theirs with you. Shared damage always leaves you at least 1 HP, so it stings without killing.
- **Trap Link** — When a trap fires on you, it fires on every other Trap Link player too. Other games' traps fire the same trap here when Bayonetta has a match, or a random Bayonetta trap when it doesn't — you never sit one out.
- **Ring Link** — Halos you collect are shared as rings with other Ring Link players (1 ring = 100 Halos), and their rings become your Halos. Shop purchases are never shared, so buying Rodin won't bankrupt your friends. Batched send/receive summaries keep the log readable when playing next to Sonic worlds.

All three can be toggled live from the in-game menu next to Death Link.

**Enzo's Pocket Change** — A new junk filler worth exactly 137 Halos. His cut, after expenses.

**Smarter tracker tab**
- **GO Mode banner** — A gold "★ GO MODE — your goal is one step away!" line appears when you're one clear, one Eye, or one boss short of victory, tuned to whichever goal you picked.
- **MacGuffin counter** — On hunt seeds, the tracker header shows "✦ Eyes of the World Fragments: 7 / 10" and turns green once you hit the required count.

**Weapon shop logic** — The generator now knows that buying a weapon at the Gates of Hell requires its Golden LP, so it will never hide a progression item behind a weapon you can't buy yet. With Golden LPs turned off, important items are kept out of the weapon shop entirely.

**Hint groups** — You can now hint whole categories at once in the client console: `!hint Golden LPs`, `!hint Weapons`, `!hint Chapter Unlocks`, and more.

**Chest-free seeds fully supported** — Turning chests off now works cleanly from generation to gameplay: the seed leaves them out, and the game stops watching for them.

### Fixed

- **Goals didn't match their names** — The goal you picked in your YAML wasn't the goal you actually got: *Chapter Count* generated as *All Chapters*, *Boss Rush* generated as a chapter count, and *No Requiem* still required Requiem. On top of that, the server considered every seed "finished" as soon as Requiem was reachable, no matter your goal. All goals now do exactly what they say and match what the game checks in-game.
- **Boss Rush was missing two bosses** — The game only checked 4 of the 6 boss chapters, so Boss Rush could finish early. Chapters XIII and XVI now count like they always should have.
- **HP traps and Damage Link were being reverted mid-frame** — Writing HP to one memory slot let the game snap it back from the other on the very next frame, so Bloodletting, Fragile Witch, and incoming shared damage silently did nothing. Both slots are now written together, matching how Death Link already worked.
- **Most Halo bundles did nothing** — 7 of the 12 Halo amounts (1,000 / 2,500 / 7,500 / 20,000 / 30,000 / 75,000 / 200,000) were silently thrown away when you received them. They now actually pay out.
- **Turning chests off could break the whole multiworld** — Generating with chests disabled could fail outright, and in games with more than one Bayonetta player it could even strip chests from *their* seeds too. Fixed properly.
- **Unbeatable seeds with techniques off** — Chapter V requires Beast Within, but with techniques turned off that item didn't exist, so the seed could never be finished. The requirement now only applies when techniques are actually randomized (otherwise you just buy it at the shop like normal).
- **Dead items removed** — "Witch Heart (Full)" and "Moon Pearl (Full)" did nothing when received, so they're no longer placed in seeds. (Broken fragments still work and still add up.)
- **Item pool always fits** — Extra hearts, pearls, consumable stacks, and Halos now fill the seed to exactly the right size no matter which options you turn off — no more too-many or too-few items.
- **Docs corrected** — There are 45 chests, not 44 (Chapter IX has 11).

### Download

- **`dinput8.dll`** — put this in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`).
- **`z.dll`** — put this in your Bayonetta game folder too (next to `Bayonetta.exe`).
- **`bayonetta.apworld`** — put this in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder (replace the old one).
- **You must regenerate** — unlike v1.3.1, this update changes the generator. New games need to be generated with the new `.apworld`. Old seeds will still play fine with the new DLL, but the goal, logic, and new-item additions only apply to freshly generated seeds.

### Heads-up

- Everyone in the multiworld who plays Bayonetta should be on the new `.apworld` before generating — mixing old and new versions in one generation is asking for trouble.
- Fresh-save advice from v1.3.1 still applies: old saves that already own shop items will insta-send those checks on connect.

Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — feedback drives every update.
v1.4.title: v1.4 - MacGuffin Hunt, Trap Items & Link Protocols

v1.4.1.description:
### Optional Update!

- This is just a quick release to change the MacGuffin Items to be called `**Memory Fragments**` instead of `**Eyes of the World Fragments**`, I do believe that it does fit more. 
- This is an Optional Update! If the name doesn't bother you, you do not need to update.

Thank You to those who voted in the poll! 💋

### Download

- **`dinput8.dll`** — put this in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`).
- **`z.dll`** — put this in your Bayonetta game folder too (next to `Bayonetta.exe`).
- **`bayonetta.apworld`** — put this in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder (replace the old one).
- **You must regenerate** — this update changes the generator. New games need to be generated with the new `.apworld`.

### Heads-up

- Everyone in the multiworld who plays Bayonetta should be on the new `.apworld` before generating — mixing old and new versions in one generation is asking for trouble.
- Fresh-save advice  still applies: old saves that already own shop items will insta-send those checks on connect.

Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — feedback drives every update.
v1.4.1.title: v1.4.1 - MacGuffin Item Name Change

v1.5.description:
## v1.5

Umbran Tears, three deadly new traps, optional verse‑rank challenges, and a
scroll‑locking fix that puts the v1.4 regression to rest.

### What's New

**Umbran Tears of Blood — 18 Normal‑mode locations**
All 18 Umbran Tears that can be collected on Normal difficulty are now proper
Archipelago locations, each with its own check. Collecting a crow fires the
location check instantly, with the classic red “✓ Tear” notification. A new
YAML option, **`include_tears`** (default off), controls them — they’re opt‑in
because tears are difficulty‑specific and only Normal is mapped right now.
Hard and Non‑Stop ∞ Climax tears can be added in a future update.

**Verse Rank (Medal) locations**
Every single verse now has an optional bonus location that fires when you
achieve the target rank. A new YAML option, **`verse_rank_target`**, lets you
choose the grade required — Stone (always on), Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum,
or Pure Platinum. Rank locations can hold any item, including progression, so
aiming high can gate important items behind skilled play. The in‑game Rank
Finder tool (Admin → Rank Finder) helps you map rank‑storage addresses if you
want to extend it.

- So now we have a total of 348 Locations to check!

**Three new traps**
The mischief pool grows again.
- **Alfheim Curse** — You can only survive three more hits before being reduced
  to 1 HP. A counter ticks down on‑screen with each blow.
- **Berserk** — Every active enemy instantly becomes enraged.
- **Gracious & Glorious** — The upgraded claw duo joins the fight. Faster,
  meaner, and definitely not Grace & Glory.

**Scroll‑bar lock fixed**
The chapter‑blocking hook now writes to memory only when the unlock limit
actually changes, instead of every frame. This restores normal mouse‑wheel
scrolling in the Load Game, Gates of Hell shop, and Chapter Select menus —
the lock that crept back in v1.4 is gone.

### Improvements

- Tear location IDs now match the six‑digit format the apworld uses, so tear
  checks display proper names instead of “? Tear”. (From my Bug tests)

### Downloads

- **`dinput8.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to
  `Bayonetta.exe`).
- **`z.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder too.
- **`bayonetta.apworld`** — place in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder
  (replace the old one).

**Existing seeds keep their original logic** — tear locations, new traps,
verse‑rank challenges, and the scroll fix all apply to freshly generated
seeds. Old seeds will still play fine with the new DLL, but the new content
needs a regeneration.

Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — every update is
shaped by player feedback.
v1.5.title: v1.5 - More Locations and Traps!
